name: Xowredrai - Blood pact dragon kin
description:
Xowredrai, a dragon kin general leading a bloody invasion of your land.

The largest among her soldiers she leads with an iron fist crushing all opposition.

Standing at 9'6 as a pillar of muscle no mortal can hope of besting her.

Perhaps there is another way.

Will you unlock the heart of the beast?

Character and art by Blue Ogre
creator: Chumbucket2
